page.title: Frequently Bought Together
page.subtitle: Show product recommendations in the Side Cart to increase average order value.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Boost your average order value by showing smart product recommendations in the Side Cart. When customers add items to their cart, they'll see products that go great together.
onboarding.readyToStartDesc: Create your first recommendation rule or load demo data to explore the dashboard.
onboarding.preview.title: Frequently Bought Together
onboarding.step.addPluginDesc: Install the plugin in your Side Cart and Checkout via the Editor
onboarding.step.createRulesDesc: Define which products are frequently bought together
onboarding.step.recommendationsShowDesc: When a customer adds an item to cart, matching recommendations appear automatically
onboarding.step.seeResultsDesc: Customers add suggested products, increasing your average order value
onboarding.feature.crossSellDesc: Recommend complementary products to increase order value
onboarding.feature.dashboardControlDesc: Manage all recommendation rules from one central place
onboarding.feature.sideCartIntegrationDe: Seamless recommendations right where customers check out
onboarding.feature.analyticsReadyDesc: Track recommendation performance with Premium plan
celebration.title: Congratulations!
celebration.desc: Your first recommendation rule is live. Customers will now see it in the Side Cart.
rules.title: Recommendation Rules
rules.limitWarning: You've reached the {limit}-rule limit on the {plan} plan.
rules.emptyDesc: Create your first rule to start showing product recommendations.
form.subtitleDefault: Click "Add Rule" above to start, or select a source product below.
form.subtitleStep1: Step 1: Select the source product (when this is in the cart, recommendations will show).
form.subtitleStep2: Step 2: Select the recommended products to show alongside the source.
form.subtitleReview: Review your selections and save the rule.
form.upgradeWarning: Upgrade to add more than {limit} rules.
form.pickFromTable: Pick one from the table below.
form.pickRecommended: Pick products from the table below.
form.noProducts: No products found. Make sure Wix Stores is installed.
form.statusDraft: Rule is saved but not shown to customers.
placement.title: Widget Placement
placement.subtitle: Choose where the FBT recommendations appear on your site.
placement.sideCartDesc: Show recommendations after line items in the Side Cart.
placement.checkoutDesc: Show recommendations in the checkout summary after line items.
placement.hintConnected: Both placements are connected. Use the toggles above to enable or disable each location.
placement.hintNotConnected: Side Cart is auto-installed. For Checkout, click "Add to Checkout" to place the plugin on your checkout page.
plan.premiumDesc: You have full access to all features including more rules and checkout recommendations.
plan.freeDesc: Upgrade for more recommendation rules and checkout placement.
pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your store.
moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.googleDriveViewerDesc: Embed & Share Google Drive files on your site
moreApps.shippingAddressVerifierDesc: Protect your store from invalid orders
moreApps.productViewer360Desc: Interactive 360° product views that boost sales
moreApps.customAdditionalFeesDesc: Add custom fees to your store checkout
howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.subtitle: Follow these steps to set up Frequently Bought Together on your site.
howToUse.step1Title: Add the plugin to Side Cart
howToUse.step1Desc: In the Wix Editor, open your store page, click the cart area, and add the "Frequently Bought Together" plugin to the slot after line items.
howToUse.step2Desc: Go to the Manage tab and use the form to define which products should be recommended when a customer adds a specific item to their cart.
howToUse.step3Desc: In the Editor, click the plugin to open its settings panel. Set the section title and max number of recommendations.
howToUse.step4Desc: Publish your site. When shoppers add items to the cart, they'll see your curated recommendations in the Side Cart and Checkout.
howToUse.howItWorksDesc: When a customer adds a product to their cart, the app checks your recommendation rules. If a matching rule is found, the recommended products are displayed in the Side Cart or Checkout so customers can add them with one click.
tips.title: Tips for Best Results
tips.tip1: Place the plugin in the Side Cart "after line items" slot so it appears right below the cart contents.
tips.tip2: Keep the section title short, e.g. "Frequently Bought Together" or "Complete your order".
tips.tip3: Show 2–3 recommendations per rule for the best conversion without overwhelming the customer.
tips.tip4: Match products that genuinely complement each other — customers appreciate relevant suggestions.
tips.tip5: Review your rules regularly and update them based on popular product combinations from your store analytics.
tips.tip6: Upgrade to Premium for more rules and advanced features.
troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.notShowingDesc: Make sure you have active rules for the products in the cart, the plugin is added in the Editor, and the placement is enabled above.
troubleshooting.notVisible: Plugin not visible in the Editor?
troubleshooting.notVisibleDesc: Open the Side Cart in the Editor, click the area after line items, and look for the "Frequently Bought Together" plugin in the plugin explorer.
toast.checkoutAdded: Checkout plugin added to your site!
toast.publishFirst: Please publish your site first, then try again.
dialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
panel.checkoutTipDesc: This plugin shows FBT recommendations at checkout. Configure recommendation rules in the app Dashboard. This panel lets you adjust the display settings.
panel.sideCartTipDesc: Configure recommendation rules in the app Dashboard. This panel lets you adjust the display settings for the Side Cart widget.
panel.checkoutFreeDesc: Free plan supports 1 rule with up to 3 recommendations. Upgrade for more rules, checkout placement, and more.
panel.sideCartFreeDesc: Free plan supports 1 rule with up to 3 recommendations. Upgrade for more rules and features.
panel.recsShowCheckout: Recommendations show automatically at checkout for products with rules.
panel.recsShowSideCart: Recommendations show automatically for products with rules.
panel.noRulesDesc: Open the Dashboard to create your first recommendation rule. The widget will show recommendations once rules are configured.
panel.sectionTitleInfoCheckout: Heading shown above recommendations at checkout.
panel.sectionTitleInfoSideCart: Heading shown above recommendations in the Side Cart.
panel.maxRecommendationsInfo: Number of products to show per rule (1–3).
plugin.editorHint: Recommendations show on the live site for products with rules
